summary: JG12 Iteration 14 - Critical bug fix verified. /api/calculator/search now returns 'alimentos' key with macros_efectivos calculated. Fixed frontend BuildMealModal.jsx to use 'alimentos' instead of 'results'. Dashboard shows correct consumed macros (P=72, H=54, G=6, kcal=558) from saved diet. All E2E flows working.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=pechuga returns 'alimentos' key (not 'results')
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search returns macros_efectivos with P, H, G, kcal calculated
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=arroz+blanco returns foods with H>0 macros_efectivos
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search supports category filter (category=2.2)
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search supports tipo_comida=intra filter
✅ Backend: POST /api/diets saves diet with comidas and alimentos correctly
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/2026-04-15 returns saved diet with exists:true
✅ Backend: Diet has correct macros (C1: pollo 200g P=42, arroz 70g H=53.9; C2: pollo 150g P=30 G=6)
✅ Backend: Total consumed macros calculated correctly (P=72, H=53.9, G=6, kcal=558)
✅ Backend: GET /api/macros returns rest day targets (P=225, H=170, G=60, 2120kcal)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows 558/2120 kcal consumed (correct!)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard circular trackers show P=72/225, H=54/170, G=6/60
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows 'HOY · DESCANSO' (Wednesday is rest day)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows 'AUTO' badge for auto-calculated macros
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage loads with saved diet foods displayed
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage COMIDA 1 shows Carne picada pechuga pollo 200g (42P|0H|0G)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage COMIDA 1 shows Arroz blanco (SOS) 70g (0P|54H|0G)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage search modal now returns foods with macros (FIXED)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage search for 'pollo' shows foods with P=17g, P=21g, P=20g etc
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage 'Guardar día' button visible and functional
critical_code_review_comments: BuildMealModal.jsx: Fixed bug - was using 'result.results' instead of 'result.alimentos' (lines 257, 289)
Backend /api/calculator/search: Correctly returns 'alimentos' key with macros_efectivos calculated via CALMA engine
ClientDashboard.jsx: Correctly fetches /api/diets/{today} and sums macros_efectivos from all meals
NutritionPage.jsx: Correctly uses 'result.alimentos' in line 283 for search results
seed_data_creation: Used existing saved diet for 2026-04-15 with C1 (pollo 200g, arroz 70g) and C2 (pollo 150g)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified the critical bug fix in /api/calculator/search. The endpoint now returns 'alimentos' key with macros_efectivos calculated. Fixed BuildMealModal.jsx to use 'alimentos' instead of 'results'. Dashboard correctly shows consumed macros from saved diet (P=72, H=54, G=6, kcal=558). Today (2026-04-15) is Wednesday which is a rest day, so targets are P=225, H=170, G=60, 2120kcal. All data-testids working: kcal-consumed, tracker-proteína, tracker-hidratos, tracker-grasa, save-diet-btn.

bug_fix_summary.fix_backend: Changed to return {alimentos: [...]} with macros_efectivos calculated via calcular_efectivos=True
bug_fix_summary.verification: Search modal now shows foods with protein values (P=17g, P=21g, etc.)
